narrative:
Hopewell Township has 1,732 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.3 percentage points.
